calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryan Kirk for Elizabeth Mackey.

Mr. Kirk explained that the Connecticut Court ordered 5% of the Hiss Trust to be distributed outright to the group Beneficiary and ordered that the balance of 95% in cash and securities be distributed to the eleven separate Trusts established under the Decedent's will. Mr. Kirk also stated that the Connecticut Court should have asked this Court to determine the terms of trust for the eleven Trusts pursuant to the Decedent's will and to identify the Trustee of said Trusts, that the Connecticut Court does not have jurisdiction over Elizabeth Sutro's will, that the 11 Trusts are not establish yet, read language from the Connecticut order, referred to the Hiss Trust (which the Connecticut Court has jurisdiction over), that the Hiss Trust is sitting in limbo and that what is at issue is reflected on page 48 of his petition (the 95% only/not the 5%). In addition, Mr. Kirk stated that he has had orders issued based on Probate Code 6325 as authority in this County as well as San Mateo County. The Petition for Orders Settling First and Final Account of Executor, etc. was continued to December 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel will file a further brief/other orders issued.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryan Kirk for Elizabeth Mackey.

The Court stated that it was prepared to approve the Petition for Final Distribution but not the request to establish the eleven Trusts based upon the authority provided. The Court also provided Counsel with the option of continuing the matter and stated that it needs further points and authorities. The accounting petition was continued to December 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file his documents at least three court days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
